arts.ttl: I left Manchester United to develop my career - but it's not going to plan
arts.sum: Man United academy graduate Ethan Wheatley left Old Trafford on loan in January for a first-team opportunity - but it is not going according to plan.

arts.ttl: One decision cost me a shot at Manchester United's treble - now I work in construction for a living
arts.sum: Michael Twiss was Manchester United reserve team player of the year in 1998 and on the brink of a first team breakthrough. He's since gone on to forge a successful second career.

arts.ttl: Arsenal to rival Man Utd and Spurs for £16.8m deal amid Arteta warning
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has warned his Arsenal players that they can't look back on Tuesday's gigantic win at PSV and must turn their focus to replicating a "great performance" against Manchester United. But it's clear the Gunners must beat United to stand any chance of winning the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Star makes transfer statement as agent criticised for deal falling through
arts.sum: Manchester United saw their January transfer window deliver mixed success but they could have more fortune in the summer while Ruben Amorim navigates a number of injury issues

arts.ttl: Premier League title race: Why Liverpool, Arne Slot have already beaten Arsenal following Newcastle United, Manchester City wins
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Southampton in the Premier League on Saturday at Anfield and the Merseysiders will likely claim another three points in their quest for the title.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes reveals how long Ruben Amorim needs to rebuild Man Utd in bold prediction
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has been in charge at Manchester United for more than three months but has yet to lift his new team back into the top half of the Premier League table

arts.ttl: Man United-linked Viktor Gyokeres makes Sporting transfer decision ahead of summer window
arts.sum: Manchester United transfer target Viktor Gyokeres reportedly makes a major decision over his Sporting Lisbon future ahead of the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund told to 'shake out' issue behind Man Utd woes after furious clash
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund had an up-and-down first season at Manchester United but has found things tougher this season - along with a number of members of Ruben Amorim's squad

arts.ttl: Podcast: Man Utd vs Arsenal - can Amorim frustrate Gunners again?
arts.sum: Ahead of an old-school Super Sunday match up between Man Utd and Arsenal, Essential Football asks whether Ruben Amorim can frustrate the Gunners again and relieve some of the pressure which he has begun to reference around his own tenure at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta lifts the lid on Chido Obi's 'unfortunate' decision to leave Arsenal and join Man United - as former academy star prepares to face old side
arts.sum: The 17-year-old completed a surprise move to Old Trafford back in October and has since had first-team opportunities amid United's recent struggles.
